Manage your online presence, without the hassle

Your teams don't have time to monitor everything. Our technology continuously analyzes, moderates, and reports insights so you can focus on what matters: creating, activating, and growing your brand.

Want to better understand your audience?

Moderation for brands

Protect your brand reputation and preserve desirability by creating safe, premium online experiences. Bodyguard’s multimodal technology helps you maintain brand-safe environments, foster authentic engagement, and build lasting trust with your audience.

Learn more
Moderation for platforms

Empower your platform to scale safely and foster healthy, engaged communities. Bodyguard’s hybrid moderation keeps user-generated content in line with your guidelines, protecting your community and strengthening trust at every interaction.

Learn more

Integrate Bodyguard into all your online spaces (even the most sensitive ones)

Connect Bodyguard directly to major social networks and community platforms to centralize your moderation and alerts. Continuously protect your Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, X, YouTube, Twitch, LinkedIn, Discord pages, and your own apps via API. Simplify your stack, maintain a unified view of your risks, and scale your protection as you grow.ext

Discover why leading industry players trust our solution.

Thanks to Bodyguard, we’ve been able to strengthen our online protection strategy. Their expertise in protecting against harmful content has let M6 maintain a secure discussion space and protect our candidates, our shows, and our commitment to our audiences.
Audrey Thiery-Amsellem
Social Media, Deputy Director
Our activity is highly media-oriented, generating numerous live messages, especially during football matches. Thanks to Bodyguard, we have achieved significant results in measuring the rate of hateful messages received every day and processing them within seconds.

With users in over 140 countries, cutting-edge technology solutions like Bodyguard are essential to scaling Yubo's content moderation for a global audience.
